seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Donald Clark's date of birth is 03/04/1937.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Chief complaint is left arm pain.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports left arm and hand pain.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Symptoms started about two weeks ago.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Pain episodes recurred over several nights and were worse at night.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Pain starts in the hand and radiates down the arm.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports hand weakness and reduced grip.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies that moving neck or turning head worsens arm pain.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies shoulder discomfort with movement.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports prior finger injury with residual dysfunction.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is taking gabapentin.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: A numbing medicine helped somewhat.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has peripheral neuropathy affecting legs below the knees.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports mild neck strain with head turning during exam.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Cervical x-ray shows significant disc degeneration (worst at C5-6) and arthritic change.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Imaging suggests possible disc-related nerve root compression.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: There is no cervical MRI available yet.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Patient presents in a wheelchair.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Patient is in no apparent distress.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Exam shows mildly restricted cervical extension and lateral rotation with mild neck pain but no radicular pain.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Spurling's maneuver is benign.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Clinician impression is left upper extremity neuropathy suspicious for cervical radiculopathy.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Clinician notes possible contribution from peripheral neuropathy.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Clinician impression includes neck pain in the setting of arthritis and disc degeneration.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Clinician suspects flare of cervical radiculopathy.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Plan is to obtain cervical MRI.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Plan is tentative left C7-T1 epidural after MRI.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Exact epidural location will depend on MRI results.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Plan is to continue gabapentin.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Plan includes follow-up after imaging and intervention.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Patient initially denies blood thinner use but later reports taking Eliquis.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Patient reports neck symptoms improved at night but hand still bothers him.
seed_gold_caps.speaker: unknown
